description:
Winter Operating Area: Caribbean Virgin Islands (United States/British Virgin Islands), Caribbean Virgin Islands (United States), Caribbean Virgin Islands (British Virgin Islands)

THE PEDDLER is a 26.31m / 86ft Motor Superyacht built in 2019 by Custom. Sleeping 8 guests in 4 cabins and with a crew of 4. Cruising at 12.00 kn/ph with a top speed of 22.00 kn/ph. The guest cabins comprise a Master cabin with a king size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, 2 cabins with a queen size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, and a cabin with a twin bed convertible to a double bed and en-suite bathroom facilities.

toys.label: Yamaha Waverunner VX Cruiser HO (1-3 Pax) - 2024
Nomad (electric personal dive hookah, like a Brownie’s Third Lung)
Bote Inflatable Lounge Chairs for Water

crew.name: Oliver Hutton
crew.bio: Captain Oliver brings over a decade of maritime experience and a true passion for the sea. Originally from New Zealand, Oliver grew up with a deep appreciation for the ocean and a spirit of adventure that naturally led him into the world of yachting. Known for his calm leadership, attention to detail, and strong dedication to safety and service, he has built a reputation as a trusted and respected captain in the yachting world. Oliver’s career began in the iconic Côte d’Azur, where his love for the ocean and adventure took shape amid the glamour of the Mediterranean. Six years ago, he brought his expertise and enthusiasm to the Caribbean, where he continues to explore its turquoise waters and vibrant island destinations. Over the years, Oliver has also captained voyages across Malta, Tahiti, Panama, Costa Rica, and the Galápagos Islands, each experience deepening his skill and appreciation for life at sea. Oliver takes pride in delivering exceptional charter experiences from start to finish. With a sharp eye for detail and a natural sense of organization, he ensures every voyage runs smoothly, offering guests a seamless blend of relaxation, adventure, and luxury. What truly sets Oliver apart is his approachable nature and genuine warmth. He creates a welcoming atmosphere on board where guests feel instantly at ease. His professionalism, positivity and intuitive understanding of people turn every charter into a memorable journey that guests treasure long after they’ve disembarked.

crew.name: Lucy Butterfield
crew.bio: Chef Lucy brings a perfect blend of culinary creativity, service excellence and warm hospitality to the world of luxury yachting. With a genuine passion for cooking and a drive to create unforgettable dining experiences Lucy combines her skills as both a talented chef and an accomplished stewardess to deliver exceptional service on every voyage. Originally from the UK, Lucy’s love for food began in her family kitchen, where she discovered the joy of crafting dishes that bring people together. She later moved to France, where her yachting career took off and her passion for combining fine dining with life at sea truly flourished. In the galley, Lucy’s dishes are as beautiful as they are delicious — thoughtfully presented and full of flavor. Her calm, friendly, and polished demeanor ensures guests feel welcome and cared for from the moment they step aboard. Always eager to explore new destinations and culinary inspiration Lucy continues to elevate the onboard dining experience.

crew.name: Mariah Smallwood
crew.bio: Stewardess Mariah Smallwood brings warmth, creativity and a world of hospitality experience to her role aboard The Peddler. Originally from Hawaii Mariah has built a vibrant career both on land and at sea blending her love for service, art, and adventure into everything she does. Before stepping into the world of yachting, Mariah honed her skills as a server, bartender, and manager in high-end restaurants across the US. Her background in mixology and fine dining translates seamlessly to life onboard where she crafts memorable guest experiences with her signature cocktails, friendly personality and eye for detail. Adding a touch of flair, Mariah also spent years performing and teaching aerial circus acrobatics and fire dancing — talents that bring energy, creativity, and a spark of entertainment to every charter. Mariah is known for her positive energy and sociable nature. She thrives in close-knit crew settings and takes pride in ensuring guests feel completely at ease. Whether she’s mixing the perfect drink, creating a beautiful table setting, or sharing stories from her travels, Mariah’s enthusiasm and professionalism makes every trip aboard The Peddler a truly memorable experience.

crew.name: Kyle Whitehead
crew.bio:
Mate/Engineer Kyle brings energy, skill, and a deep love for the ocean to his role aboard The Peddler. Originally from Antigua, Kyle grew up surrounded by the sea and the vibrant yachting culture of the Caribbean. Kyle combines his technical expertise and hands-on experience to ensure every charter runs safely, smoothly, and enjoyably. Before joining the yachting industry, Kyle worked in aviation maintenance, a background that honed his precision, organization, and problem-solving abilities — all of which translate seamlessly into his engineering and deck responsibilities. Over the years, he’s worked aboard a wide range of sailing and motor yachts. A passionate outdoorsman, Kyle thrives when he’s on or under the water, he’s an experienced fisherman and diver and always eager to share his local knowledge and love for marine life with guests. Whether it’s helping you cast a line in some of the Caribbean’s best fishing spots or leading a snorkeling
adventure. Kyle’s enthusiasm and expertise help create unforgettable moments at sea. Known for his positive energy and friendly nature, Kyle is a team player who keeps spirits high on board. His deep familiarity with the Caribbean, strong work ethic and love for adventure make him an invaluable part of The Peddler crew — and a key part of what makes each charter truly special.
